title: Pecan prototype
summary: Pecan-era research baseline: parser and semantic pipeline, JIT/runtime with simple GC spikes, early LSP prototype, and project structure exploration before the Beskid rename.

cutoff.rationale: Pecan prototype history up to compiler submodule handoff (2026-03-05). Historical Pecan repo was deleted; commit SHAs preserved from archived history (Cascade snapshot commits omitted).
